differentials.name: Mechanism:   compromised perfusion of bile ducts
differentials.raw: Mechanism:   compromised perfusion of bile ducts

context: =  process present for < 6 months √  hepatomegaly / normal size of liver √  gallbladder wall thickening √  lymphadenopathy CT: √  periportal low attenuation (lymph edema) US: √  diffuse decrease in liver echogenicity √  increased brightness of portal triads ("starry sky" pattern) = centrilobular pattern ← edema in hepatocytes (DDx: leukemic infiltrate, diffuse lymphomatous involvement, toxic shock syndrome) √  edema of gallbladder fossa + gallbladder wall thickening √  thickening + increase in echogenicity of fat within falciform ligament, ligamentum venosum, porta hepatis, periportal connecti
